name: Pecan Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter until soft and smooth.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the sifted ingredients alternately with milk to the creamed mixture.
4. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
5. Pour the batter into a large baking pan.
6. Mix the topping ingredients (1 cup brown sugar, 2 tablespoons cinnamon, and 3/4 cup flour) until they form pea-sized crumbs.
7. Blend in the pecans.
8. Spread over the top of the batter.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40-50 minutes.
10. Cut into squares.
